+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class, type re-exports from types/context/request/client modules.
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, Context, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions.
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client.
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point for Hono framework; re-exports core classes and types.
+- Copy-safe detail: 53-line TypeScript module; re-exports Hono from ./hono and types from ./context, ./request, ./client.
+
+## src/types.ts
+
+- Public surface: Types Bindings, Variables, Env, Next, Input, Schema, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, HTTPResponseError, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface.
+- Internal names noticed: Context, HonoBase, CustomHeader, RequestHeader, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, JSONValue, RemoveBlankRecord, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, RouterRoute, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, IfAny, IntersectNonAnyTypes, ExtractInput, ResponseFormat, StatusCode, BlankEnv, Request, RequestInit, HonoURL, TypedURL, BuildSearchParamsFn, BuildSearch, BuildPath, BuildPathname, ClientRequest, ClientRequestOptions, Client, BuildPath, HonoURL, ParseHostName, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, IsEmptyObject, Response, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferResponseTypeFromEndpoint, InferEndpointType, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, PickResponseByStatusCode, PickSchema, PickRoute, ModRoute, ModSchema.
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ../utils/headers, ../utils/http-status, ../utils/types, ./router.
+- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive type definitions for Hono; includes environment types, schema types, handler signatures, interface definitions, client types, and utility types.
+- Copy-safe detail: 1607+ lines; defines types for bindings/routes/handlers/interfaces and all client-side types; no implementation code.
+
+## src/hono.ts
+
+- Public surface: Hono class.
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions.
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types.
+- Plain-English summary: Hono main application class extending HonoBase with default router setup.
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines; class extends HonoBase, sets up default router from options, simple constructor.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+
+- Public surface: Hono class with get/post/put/delete//options/patch/all/on/use methods, route, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, fetch, request, fire static methods.
+- Internal names noticed: compose, Context, ExecutionContext, Router, Env, ErrorHandler, FetchEventLike, H, HandlerInterface, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, MiddlewareHandler, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, Next, NotFoundHandler, OnHandlerInterface, RouterRoute, Schema, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, GetPath, MountOptionHandler, MountReplaceRequest, MountOptions, Clone, Hono as HonoBase, METHOD_NAME_ALL, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASES, IntersectNonAnyTypes.
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url.
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono class providing routing, middleware, error handling, mount applications, fetch/request/fire entry points.
+- Copy-safe detail: 545 lines; core implementation of request/middleware handling, router integration, cloning, error/not-found handlers, mount method for multi-framework apps.
+
+## src/context.ts
+
+- Public surface: Context class with env, req, res, event, executionCtx, layout, setRenderer, var, header, status, set/get, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound methods/helpers.
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, Result, Env, Input, NotFoundHandler, RouterRoute, TypedResponse, ResponseHeader, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, StatusCode, BaseMime, InvalidJSONValue, IsAny, JSONParsed, JSONValue, HeaderRecord, Data, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, Renderer, DefaultRenderer, PropsForRenderer, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, JSONRespondReturn, HTMLRespond, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond, Get, Set, NewResponse, SetHeaders, SetHeadersOptions, SetHeaders, ResponseHeadersInit, ResponseInit, ResponseOrInit, setDefaultContentType, createResponseInstance, TEXT_PLAIN.
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request, ./router, ../types, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types.
+- Plain-English summary: Context class for handling web requests; stores request/response, environment bindings, execution context; provides text/json/html/render response methods; manages headers/status/errors/layout/renderer.
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines; main context implementation, response factory methods, variable storage, request access, layout/rendering support.
+
+## src/request.ts
+
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class with raw, param, query, queries, header, parseBody, json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, addValidatedData, valid, url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath getters; cloneRawRequest utility.
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, Result, Input, InputToDataByTarget, ParamKeyToRecord, ParamKeys, RemoveQuestion, RouterRoute, ValidationTargets, parseBody, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, CustomHeader, RequestHeader, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode, Body, BodyCache, OptionalRequestInitProperties, RequiredRequestInit, Body, GET_MATCH_RESULT, CloneRawRequest, HonoRequest.
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url.
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper for web requests; provides param/query/header accessor helpers; caches body read types; validates input; utilities for cloning consumed requests.
+- Copy-safe detail: 505 lines; HonoRequest class wraps native Request, caches consumed body parts, provides query/header/accessor methods, validates against schema, clones after body consumption.
+

+## src/utils/body.ts
+
+- Public surface: parseBody.

+- Imports or neighbors: ../request.
+- Plain-English summary: Parses request body from multipart/form-data or application/x-www-form-urlencoded Content-Type; handles nested dot notation objects.
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines; parseBody function dispatches to parseFormData, supports all/dot options for field handling, converts FormData to typed object output.
+
+## src/compose.ts
+
+- Public surface: compose.
+- Internal names noticed: Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, dispatch.
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types.
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition middleware functions using Koa-inspired compose to create a linear chain.
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines; exports compose that takes middleware arrays with error/not-found handlers, returns composed function dispatching through middleware stack.
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+
+- Public surface: HTTPException class.
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode, getResponse.
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status.
+- Plain-English summary: HTTPException thrown for auth failures; optional response/status/message; getResponse creates response from stored/derived data.
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines; class extends Error with status and optional res; constructor accepts status/options; getResponse returns Response with proper setup.
+

+- Internal names noticed: None.
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./client/utils, ./types, ./utils/cookie.
+- Plain-English summary: Client entry point; exports hc function and utility exports for request/response inference and error handling.
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines; re-exports hc from ./client, parseResponse/DetailedError from ./utils; pulls types from ./types; simple barrel export file.
+
+## src/client/client.ts

+- Public surface: hc.
+- Internal names noticed: Proxy, ClientRequestImpl, ClientRequestOptions, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, Callback.
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ./utils/cookie, ../utils/types, ./types, ./utils.
+- Plain-English summary: hc function builds proxy with ClientRequestImpl that constructs fetch requests with query params/path params/body for API clients.
+- Copy-safe detail: 223 lines; createProxy makes tree traversal with callback; ClientRequestImpl builds requests with query/json/body handling; hc returns proxy with method/url/path/ws support.
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+
+- Public surface: BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, Response, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptions, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, PickResponseByStatusCode, MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, ExpandAllMethod.
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, Endpoint, ExtractSchema, KnownResponseFormat, ResponseFormat, StatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, HasRequiredKeys, BuildSearch, BuildPath, BuildTypedURL, HonoURL, HonoURL, ParseHostName, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, IsEmptyObject, TypedURL, Response, ClientResponse, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, Callback, CallbackOptions, ObjectType, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickRoute, PickSchema, InferResponseTypeFromEndpoint, InferEndpointType, InferRequestType.
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ./utils/http-status, ./types/../utils/types.
+- Plain-English summary: Client-side type definitions; request/response types, client request options with buildSearchParams, WebSocket support, method/url/path helpers, schema inference for typed clients.
+- Copy-safe detail: 393 lines; type definitions for hc client API: ClientRequest/ClientResponse types, method inference, path/query param types, infer helpers for typed responses.
+

+
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse.
+- Internal names noticed: ClientErrorStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, DetailedError, fetchRP, ObjectType, IsObject.
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please.

+- Copy-safe detail: 114 lines; mergePath joins paths, replaceUrlParam substitutions, buildSearchParams creates URLSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse wraps fetchRP with response handling.
+

+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines; nullBodyResponses list, detectResponseType via header check, JSON regex, fetchRP returns _data or throws DetailedError, DetailedError with detail/code/log/statusCode fields.
+

+- Internal names noticed: HandleOptions, handle.

+

+
+- Public surface: handle.
+- Internal names noticed: Handler, FetchEvent, HandleOptions.
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./types.
+- Plain-English service worker handler that responds with Hono app output and falls back to origin fetch on 404s.
+- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines; handle returns function accepting FetchEvent, app.fetches with evt/context, opts.fetch fallback on 404, responds with app or fallback result.
+
